title: crotalaria onusta
intro: Crotalaria onusta, also known as a species of the Crotalaria genus, is a plant native to tropical Africa, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria onusta include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a treatment for snake bites and wounds. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria onusta can be used as a tea or tincture, often combined with other herbs, to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
